✦ Active Contracts

cols:
↑ Gold per progress tick (max 100 gp per task)

ℹ Contracts Screen Guide

Action row: ↕ reorder · 🕒 defer to back burner · ✂ split · ⚭ merge · 📌 pin · ✕ archive/delete/recur · 💰 claim gold.

Split: break a task with 2+ sub-tasks into two tasks. Both halves stay in the same bordered panel.

Merge: combine two tasks into one master. Choose the new title and the order of the combined sub-tasks.

Pin (📌): mirrors any task or sub-task at the top of the screen for prominence. Toggling progress on the pinned copy updates the original — they share the same data.

Waiting (⏳): swipe a sub-task right to reveal the ⏳ button, or tap the ⏳ on the task action row — either opens a short note editor for "who are you waiting on?" The row tints teal, a small note badge appears, and the checkbox swaps to an hourglass. When you're no longer waiting, open the editor again and tap "✓ Done waiting." Checking the item off also auto-clears waiting. On desktop you can right-click a checkbox to toggle the flag directly.

Favourites & scheduled contracts: weekly / monthly / yearly tasks scheduled in The Archive auto-activate at your configured start-of-day.

⟲ Recent Actions

Tap Revert on any of the last 20 actions to roll it back.

⭐ Kudos

Tasks and sub-tasks you've completed. Newest first.

🕰 Snapshot History

Each snapshot is a complete copy of your save stored on Supabase. Newest first. Tap Restore to roll back — your current state is auto-snapshotted first as a safety net.

🕰 Restore Snapshot?

This will overwrite your current save with the contents of this snapshot. Your current state is auto-saved as a fresh snapshot first, so this is reversible.

🔄 Another device updated this account

ℹ What does this mean? tap to expand

A different device pushed updates to your account since this one last synced. Pull those updates to catch up, or keep working with this device's local state — but be aware that future edits here will overwrite the other device's newer work.

📊 Field-by-field diff tap to view

✦ Contract Archive

⭐ = favourite (daily/custom auto-activates at morning reset). Weekly, monthly, and yearly tasks can be scheduled with Pick selectors and move to Contracts at the configured start of day. ↑↓ reorder within group. Action icons: ⇡ move to top, 🪙 claim gold, ▶ activate, 🗑 delete.

✦ The Adventuring Party
✦ Recruitment Office
Review candidates, hirelings, or cancel to return to the Party screen.
Standard Recruitment

Choose from five candidates. First roll is free — additional rerolls cost 10 gp.

Roll the dice to reveal candidates…
🪓 Hire a Hireling

Low-cost labour with minimal abilities. Cannot go on quests alone. First roll is free — rerolls cost 5 gp.

Roll to find available labour…
⭐ Custom Mercenary

Hand-pick attributes for a higher fee. Each selected attribute adds 50 gp to the base cost. Skills capped at 4, tools at 2, languages at 2 — same as standard, but you choose which ones. Comes with a class-appropriate equipment kit.

You may pick up to 4 skill pills. Leave all unselected to randomize class-appropriate skills.
You may pick up to 2 tool pills. Leave all unselected to randomize tools.
You may pick up to 2 language pills. Common is always included automatically.
🪙 500 gp base
Base 500 gp + 0 gp in options = 500 gp total

🎟 Redeem a Voucher

Paste a voucher code to claim the QP it carries. Each voucher can only be redeemed once.

🎟 Class Codes

Generate login codes for students. Each code creates an independent save slot — no email or personal data required.

Relentless Quest
Relentless Quest
Version 1.7136
Dev mode: navy quick-access bar below the header with Ledger, QP Manager, +1 Day, and Exit Dev Mode.
Branding
Daily Reset
Use an exact time. Favourite contracts auto-activate once each day the first time the app reaches or passes that time.
Contract Preferences
When every sub-task of a contract is checked, the Archive / Delete / Recur modal opens automatically. Turn off to only show the modal when you tap the contract's Done button.
📘 Tutorial & Reference
How things work in Relentless Quest. Pick a category, then tap a topic to expand.
📜 Change Log
Tap to review notable stable updates.
Loading changelog…
🧪 Test Mode
Test mode only — changes quest timer for new assignments. Use the fast-forward button below to instantly complete quests already in progress.
🎲 Dev Rolling Table
Two-second icosahedron roll simulation with high-speed entry, edge bounces, and settling before result.
Press Roll 1d20.
🎲 Recruitment Names
When enabled, recruits receive names typical for their species. First names are never reused.
Data
Snapshots are stored on Supabase. Older ones are pruned automatically.
Import replaces all current data. Export first to back up.
🧪 Milestone Loader
Loads a curated test snapshot. Archive groups and settings are preserved; active party, gold, contracts, quest progress, storage, and logs are replaced.
🧪 Developer Tools
Enable dev mode to access quest test tools, content editor, milestone loader, rolling table, and data tools. Dev mode is per-session and resets on logout.
☁ Cloud Sync (Supabase)
Auto-syncs after every change. Pull to load from another device.

⚔ Choose Weapon Type

Select the weapon type for this +1 weapon.

⏳ Waiting On…

Optional. Leave blank to just flag the item as waiting without a note.

🗂 Archive, Delete, or Recur

Recurring contracts are sent to the Archive and auto-reactivated at the daily reset time.
You can turn it back on in Settings → Contract Preferences.

✏️ Edit Contract

🕐 Back Burner

Defer "" with a quick option or choose a specific date and time.

Defaults to the nearest upcoming 3-hour block.

🕯 Downtime Assignment

Choose a downtime activity for "" and set when it should complete.

8h is standard. Shorter sessions incur a roll penalty; longer sessions add a bonus.

🎲 Downtime Roll

Rolling...

🕯 Pending Downtime Rolls

🔬 Downtime Audit

Cross-references each pending downtime against three signals: (1) S.downtimeRollHistory — strongest evidence; (2) character state (does the character already have the trait this downtime would unlock?) — medium evidence; (3) adventure log mentions of a matching completion — weak evidence.

⚠ No bulk-clean button. Downtime rolls have gameplay side effects (skill / language / faith / contacts / intel unlocks) that we can't verify post-hoc. If you splice a pending entry without confirming the side effects already applied, you may silently deny yourself an unlock. Use this audit to inform a manual decision; clean only via console after careful review.

✉ Inbox

No pending notifications.

🔬 Inbox Audit

Each inbox entry is cross-referenced against S.questLog (your collection record). If a row appears below as already collected, a matching log entry exists — strong evidence the inbox row is a stale duplicate rather than a fresh return.

⚠ Forfeit Downtime Progress?

Assigning this roster to a quest will cancel active downtime immediately. Any uncollected downtime progress/rewards will be forfeited.

⚠ Limited Contact Assigned

One or more contacts on this quest have a limited number of quests remaining before departing the franchise. Each contact below will be used once if you proceed.

🕐 Defer Group

Defer all tasks in "" until a set time.

    🤝 Hey, buddy! Welcome back!
    Look, I'm not supposed to say this, but... you already got the Bag of Holding, right? Still sitting in storage? Still perfectly good?

    Between you and me — skip the whole certified package. Sew your own tabards. Print your own charter. I've seen franchises built on nothing but a handshake and a dream.

    Today only: guild registration, territory filing, and we look the other way on the livery — all for just 50 gp. That's practically free.

    Slots
    Your Party
    ⚔

    Squads Required

    Your franchise needs a standing squad

    To activate a quest cycle, you need to assign a Squad — a named group of adventurers who will tackle that cycle together.

    Squads let you manage multiple active cycles at once, track which characters are deployed where, and unlock territory-based mechanics like the Territory Swap.

    Tap Create Squad to build your first squad from your current roster. You can always rename, recolor, and adjust members later from the Party screen.

    ⚔ No Available Squad

    All squads are currently assigned. Create a new squad from available adventurers to continue.

    🎒 Acquire Item

    This will count toward relevant quest prerequisites.

    📂 Move to Group

    👋 Welcome to Your Franchise

    Start by creating or activating contracts on the Contracts screen. Tap + Add to make a new task, then use the gold button on a task whenever you complete progress on it.

    Visit the Recruitment Office from the Party screen to hire full adventurers or budget hirelings. Your Founder begins the company, but extra hands help you tackle larger jobs.

    On the Quest screen, choose a quest, assign a valid party, and begin the adventure. Regular quests require at least one Level 1+ full adventurer. When they return, use franchise gold or each hero's purse to buy gear from the Store.

    Tip: archived contracts can stay in storage for occasional work, and favourites can still repopulate automatically at your reset time.
